MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JOHNSON CONTROLS, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The revised verified application of Matthew Goldschmidt to appear pro hac vice as counsel to defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.
